title: dichondra repens var. carolinensis
intro: Dichondra repens var. carolinensis, also known as Carolina kidneyweed or Poor Man's Potato, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dichondra repens var. carolinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
